loomTypes.tapestry_loom: Tapestry Loom — project tracking not currently supported
loomTypes.rug_loom: Rug Loom — project tracking not currently supported
loomTypes.frame_loom: Frame Loom — project tracking not currently supported

landing.heroBody: Upload your WIF draft, follow along pick by pick, and keep a complete record of every draft from first warp to last pick.
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need at the loom

trackWeaves.title: Track your weaves
trackWeaves.body: Upload your WIF draft and step through every pick. weftmark keeps your place so you can put down the shuttle and pick it right back up.

recordPicks.title: Record every pick
recordPicks.body: Advance, reverse, or jump to any row. Mark a project complete when the last pick is woven in.

manageTools.title: Manage your tools
manageTools.body: Keep a record of your looms and yarn. Assign a loom to a draft and track what's on the beam.
